issue_statement: The current spec drafts around IDE delivery projection and engineering onboarding are directionally useful but too broad to execute steadily without blind changes.
expected_outcome: A smaller spec group exists so SCE can land the IDE Delivery column and engineering onboarding contracts in stable, phaseable steps.
impact_scope: engine=scene/spec/task/app projection; consumer=frontend IDE and CLI adapters
reproduction_steps: Read the current broad draft specs for delivery projection and onboarding
Observe that delivery projection, preview/open, scaffold, and ownership are mixed across wide contracts
Try to pick one implementation order without additional decomposition
forbidden_workarounds: Do not let the frontend build permanent parallel truth from partial backend commands
Do not mix multi-agent runtime work into this phase-1 IDE projection task
